benefits.description: Significant improvement in sleep quality and restfulness; 6+ hours of deep, uninterrupted sleep. First night described as best sleep in years.
Increased recovery mentioned as original intention
Fat loss mentioned as original purpose

side_effects.description: Slight injection site irritation for a minute after injection

protocol_notes: 2mg/2ml concentration at 0.1ml dose, 5 days per week. Administered via telemedicine HRT clinic (Evolve HRT). Injections done separately. Timing: 1 hour to 30 minutes prior to bed, with last meal at least 1 hour before injection. Also on TRT through same clinic. Previously used BPC-157 for knee dislocation with good results.
